subject: PS
corpus_note: the SAME confidence-interval computation as content/PS/problems/ps-prob-001.yaml, re-expressed in PYTHON to exercise the Python runner. LANGUAGE != SUBJECT-EXAM-LANGUAGE: the PS exam language is r; this fixture tests the runner, not the routing (routing truth is Task 3's). erfinv is Newton-refined on math.erf to avoid a scipy dependency; output is formatted to match R's print().
